annotations.text: In the coordinate system defined by the eigenvectors, the unit square is transformed into a rectangle whose width is three and height is one.

annotation.text: In the coordinate system defined by the eigenvectors, multiplying by A stretches by three in the direction of one eigenvector and multiplies by negative one in the direction of the other
The transformed grid of linear combinations of eigenvectors
In this coordinate system, the unit square is stretched and flipped
